Document:
# Science [color=#c96dbf]Science[/color], often called Research and Development, is a job consisting of generating research points to unlock new technologies and using said technologies to produce new items at lathes to help out the station.
## Personnel [color=#c96dbf]Science[/color]'s staff is made up of Research Assistants and Scientists. [color=#c96dbf]Science[/color] is run by the Research Director.
## Research Tree
The most important thing inside your department is the R&D server, which stores your research tree, and the R&D computer, which allows you to queue up research and unlock [color=#a4885c]technologies[/color].
Use R&D computer to look around the tree. Options available for research are shown in white, already researched ones are [color=green]green[/color], and those missing requirements are [color=gray]gray[/color].
Select them to see what they unlock. Then press "research" to add something the the research queue. It's imporant to keep your eye on the tree and have future research planned. [color=yellow]Otherwise you risk losing your research points[/color].
Each technology costs [color=#a4885c]Research Points[/color], when researched it unlocks recipes at lathes or additional functionality for devices around the station.
When any [color=#a4885c]Research Points[/color] are acquired, they are first spent to unlock technologies in the research queue. If there are any points left after researching last technology in the queue, points are added to bank.
Be careful, the bank has a limit. When that limit is reached, [color=red]all additional points are lost[/color].
## Tiers Research tree is divided into tiers. At the start the only tier that is open and available for you is tier 1.
In order to progress further, you have to spend required amount of points in previous tiers.
## Lathes
At a lathe, you can choose a server to allow it print whatever recipes you have unlocked. Recipes require various materials (steel, glass, plastic, gold, plasma) which can be acquired at Cargo or Salvage.
